records.snippet: collapse Clause HOME | OPENMP API Specification: "Version 5.2 -- GIT rev 95b2e3a44" [ next ] [ prev ] [ prev-tail ] [ tail ] [ up ] 4.4.3 collapse Clause Name: collapse Properties: unique Arguments Name Type Properties n expression of integer type default Directives distribute , do , for , loop , simd , taskloop Semantics The collapse clause associates one or more loops with the directive on which
